name: Rashid khan
Description: Rashid khan is a best bowling all-rounder in the all world he is the number one t20 bowler besides khan is the captain of Afghanistan Cricket team in t20 format he plays cricket in alot of league in diffrent countries such as : IPL, PSL , APL ,SHPAGEEZA,CRIBEN, HUNDRED BALLS ,BIG BASH and e.t.c he recived Afghanistan cricket to semi-final in 2024 t20 cricket world cup which played in west-indies and United-state of America According my opinion Rashid is a king
